_note: Master project list. Each project is self-contained and structured for easy AI parsing, webcruiter export, and website rendering. Add new projects here — the website and CV generator will pick them up automatically.

projects.title: Field Inspection Canvas App
projects.summary: Replaced paper-based safety and equipment inspection checklists with a mobile-first Power Apps canvas app. Photos, GPS, offline support — all backed by Dataverse.
projects.problem: Inspections were paper-based. Photos lived on technicians' phones. Reports were typed up back at the office the next day, and urgent findings slipped through. The back-office team spent ~15 hours per week chasing missing forms and re-keying data into SharePoint lists.
projects.solution: Designed and built a mobile-first canvas app with offline support so field crews could work on sites with poor signal. Dataverse provides the structured data backbone. Power Automate routes high-severity findings to the duty manager within minutes via Teams notifications. A Power BI dashboard gives leadership live site-wide trends.
impact: Inspection cycle time: 24 hours → under 15 minutes from completion to report
100% audit trail on safety-critical findings with SLA tracking
Client team fully self-sufficient after single handover workshop

testimonial.quote: We stopped losing reports overnight. The Teams notification the day we went live pinged three urgent findings that would have waited until morning.
testimonial.author: Operations Manager

projects.title: Invoice Approval Automation
projects.summary: Multi-stage invoice approval flow with SLA tracking. Cut approval cycle time from 9 days to under 48 hours and eliminated the email chase entirely.
projects.problem: Invoice approvals ran over email with no visibility, no SLA enforcement, and constant chasing. Average cycle time was 9 days — unacceptable for supplier relationships and cash flow forecasting.
projects.solution: Built a Power Automate cloud flow with multi-stage approval logic, automatic escalation when SLAs are breached, and full audit history in SharePoint. Approvers receive adaptive cards directly in Teams — one click to approve, reject, or request information.
impact: Approval cycle time: 9 days → under 48 hours
Full audit trail with timestamped approval history
SLA breach alerts escalate automatically to finance manager

projects.title: Copilot Studio HR Agent
projects.summary: Internal HR assistant answering policy and leave questions in Teams. Grounded on SharePoint content with escalation to a human agent when needed.
projects.problem: HR team fielded hundreds of repetitive questions per month about leave policies, onboarding, benefits, and expense procedures — all answered by digging through a SharePoint document library with poor search.
projects.solution: Built a Copilot Studio agent grounded on the organisation's SharePoint HR content. The agent handles Q&A, escalates unresolved queries to a live HR agent via Omnichannel, and logs all interactions in Dataverse for trend analysis. Deployed natively in Microsoft Teams.
impact: Deflected ~60% of repetitive HR queries from human agents
Average query resolution time: days → seconds for covered topics
HR team freed to focus on complex, high-value cases
Full conversation log for compliance and continuous improvement
